text.title: Spatial UX Fundamentals Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml. MANDATORY per F-066 DoD — even flat methodologies have a tree.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition trigger?

branch.question: Is a named single accountable owner present (not "team" / "we" / "us")?
Are the required inputs reachable and citable?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology; produce the artefact and validate it.
defer until inputs are reachable; paraphrased substitutes are worse than skipping.
block; require a single named owner before any further work.
do not apply this methodology; route to a more appropriate one or emit a skip-record.

text.example: All preconditions satisfied, owner named, inputs reachable -> conclusion ref=r1-three-comfort-zones.
